message:
feat(web): wire operator selection into prompt composition

Connect the OperatorSelector UI to the prompt generation pipeline:
- prompts.ts: Add operatorSelection param to ComposePromptInput
- prompts.ts: Inject ROLE OPERATOR ASSIGNMENTS section when provided
- api/sessions/route.ts: Pass operatorSelection through session kickoff
- OperatorSelector.tsx: Add focus-visible ring states for accessibility
- DistillationViewer.tsx: Add focus-visible and touch polish to TOC

This enables users to customize which operators are emphasized for
each agent role (Hypothesis Generator, Test Designer, Adversarial
Critic) when composing Brenner Protocol session prompts.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+          "focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background",
           disabled && "opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed"
         )}

+              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted/50 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all touch-manipulation focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring"
             >
               <RefreshIcon />
               Reset to defaults
@@ -239,6 +240,7 @@ function RoleCard({
               className={cn(
                 "inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm",
                 "border transition-all touch-manipulation active:scale-95",
+                "focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-1",
                 isSelected
                   ? "bg-primary/10 border-primary/30 text-primary"
                   : "bg-background/50 border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/30 hover:text-foreground",
